description: End-to-end coverage for the Phase 4a.2a runCode bug #1 fix: runCode now forwards its own exitCodes (and other runShell-honored options) when delegating to runShell. Previously exitCodes was silently dropped, so a non-zero exit FAILed even when whitelisted. Node-only code keeps this cross-platform (no shell syntax, avoids the Windows bash restriction).

steps.description: Bug #1: a forwarded exitCodes:[1] makes a process.exit(1) PASS. Before the fix the option was dropped and this FAILed.
Default exitCodes ([0]) still PASS for a clean exit, proving the forwarding didn't break the happy path.
